title: Edelman, Lego Education give children a voice on AI
text:
Edelman, Lego Education give children a voice on AI
2026-01-13
Edelman's campaign for Lego Education includes a student-led AI study and a short film, "We Trust in Kids," directed by Lauren Greenfield. The film shows children discussing AI's role in education, highlighting their positive outlook and desire to be included in AI conversations. The campaign also introduces a new curriculum for AI and computer science for K-8 students.
